name: synergy-frontend-kit
description: Professional frontend design capabilities for Synergy agents — design methodology skills, shadcn/ui component access, layout enforcement, and visual verification.
author: Synergy Community

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Anthropic's frontend design methodology: plan-before-code, declarative-first, atomic refinement. Use when building or redesigning frontend UIs.

skills.name: taste-frontend
skills.description: Taste Skill v2: systematic design sensibility for frontend. Covers typography, spacing, color theory, and visual hierarchy.

skills.name: soft-design
skills.description: Taste soft-skill: design language for gentle, approachable interfaces. Rounded corners, soft shadows, warm palettes, generous whitespace.

skills.name: minimalist-design
skills.description: Taste minimalist-skill: reductive design principles. Essential elements only, negative space as a feature, typography-driven layouts.

agents.name: frontend-designer
agents.description: Frontend design specialist. Produces visually polished, accessible UIs using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Applies design methodology from loaded skills.

shadcn.description: shadcn/ui component registry and code generation

layout-context.description: Design system enforcement and layout context

playwright.description: Browser automation for visual verification and screenshots

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize frontend tooling in the current project (shadcn/ui, layout.design, Playwright)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Sync bundled skills with upstream source repositories
